; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1
@.str.0 = private unnamed_addr constant [3 x i8] c"OK\00", align 1
@.str.1 = private unnamed_addr constant [8 x i8] c"Created\00", align 1
@.str.2 = private unnamed_addr constant [12 x i8] c"Bad Request\00", align 1
@.str.3 = private unnamed_addr constant [10 x i8] c"Not Found\00", align 1
@.str.4 = private unnamed_addr constant [22 x i8] c"Internal Server Error\00", align 1
@.str.5 = private unnamed_addr constant [8 x i8] c"Unknown\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @puts(ptr)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_httpStatus
define ptr @InputKt_httpStatus(i32 %arg0) {
entry:
  %merge_2 = alloca ptr
  br label %bb1
bb1:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 200
  %t1 = icmp eq i32 %arg0, %t0
  br i1 %t1, label %bb2, label %bb3
bb2:
  store ptr @.str.0, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb12
bb3:
  %t2 = add i32 0, 201
  %t3 = icmp eq i32 %arg0, %t2
  br i1 %t3, label %bb4, label %bb5
bb4:
  store ptr @.str.1, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb12
bb5:
  %t4 = add i32 0, 400
  %t5 = icmp eq i32 %arg0, %t4
  br i1 %t5, label %bb6, label %bb7
bb6:
  store ptr @.str.2, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb12
bb7:
  %t6 = add i32 0, 404
  %t7 = icmp eq i32 %arg0, %t6
  br i1 %t7, label %bb8, label %bb9
bb8:
  store ptr @.str.3, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb12
bb9:
  %t8 = add i32 0, 500
  %t9 = icmp eq i32 %arg0, %t8
  br i1 %t9, label %bb10, label %bb11
bb10:
  store ptr @.str.4, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb12
bb11:
  store ptr @.str.5, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb12
bb12:
  %t10 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  ret ptr %t10
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 200
  %t1 = call ptr @InputKt_httpStatus(i32 %t0)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t1)
  %t3 = add i32 0, 404
  %t4 = call ptr @InputKt_httpStatus(i32 %t3)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t4)
  %t6 = add i32 0, 500
  %t7 = call ptr @InputKt_httpStatus(i32 %t6)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t7)
  %t9 = add i32 0, 999
  %t10 = call ptr @InputKt_httpStatus(i32 %t9)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t10)
  ret i32 0
}
